extraction.one_line_summary: MAJKA Rafał attacked solo 10km from summit finish on Sierra de la Pandera, held off favorites by 27 seconds after breakaway.
tactical_patterns: MAJKA attacked from breakaway at 10km mark when steep wall fragmented group rather than waiting for summit.
CONTADOR's attack at 3.5km too late after breakaway absorbed; early positioning from remnants proved superior.
NIBALI sprinted for 4-second bonus despite arriving in group, showing GC micro-gains matter on summit finishes.

rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: positive: timed solo attack from breakaway at exact fragmentation point 10km out, held 27 seconds on motivated chasers
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: attacked at 3.5km from finish but couldn't distance FROOME, suggesting declining climbing power late race
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: second on stage after late attack, confirmed climbing form with ability to drop main GC group
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: tactical awareness to sprint for 4-second bonus in group finish despite not contesting stage win
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: marked all moves but didn't lose time, conservative defense holding 55-second lead over NIBALI
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: negative: suffered on Pantera ascent and lost GC ground, weakness on sustained 8% climbs exposed
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: negative: fell back on final climb alongside CHAVES, losing GC positions on sustained steep gradient
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: moved up in GC by surviving final climb better than CHAVES and DE LA CRUZ
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: gained GC positions when CHAVES and DE LA CRUZ faltered on out-of-category ascent
